hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path') && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.py$' && ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
echo '--- Post-compaction context ---' && git log --oneline -10 2>/dev/null && echo '--- Uncommitted changes ---' && git diff --stat HEAD 2>/dev/null || true
